name: Mike's Texas Chili - Southern Style
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Instant coffee or 1/2 cup real coffee
1 teaspoon Garlic powder or minced garlic
1 teaspoon Tabasco or 1/4 teaspoon Cayenne pepper (to taste)
1/2 cup Green and red peppers, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the pork and beef in a large skillet until thoroughly cooked.
2. Drain excess fat from the meat.
3. Add all ingredients to a large crock pot and cover.
4. Cook on high for 4-6 hours or low for 8-12 hours.
5. The longer it cooks, the thicker it gets.
6. Cubed roast or steak may be substituted for the ground meat if desired.
Note: This can also be cooked on top of the stove. Brown the pork and beef first, then cook onions until they become limp. Add all other ingredients and cook for 5 minutes. Stir every 10 to 15 minutes before adding the meat last. Cover and cook on low for at least 4 hours.
